    Refreshes the reservations table by requesting the current user's reservations from the client handler.

    Refreshes the reservations table by requesting the current user's reservations from the client handler.

    Marks the table as available.

    Updates a table's state to 'Available' in the database.

    Removes a client's information string from the UI list upon disconnection.
    removeDay() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Removes the selected day from weekly opening hours and updates the server.
    RemoveOpeningHoursCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for removing a set of weekly opening hours from the system.

    removeWeeklyOpeningHours(Day) - Method in class logicControllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Removes a weekly opening hours entry for a specific day and cancels all reservations on that day.

    Represents a report generated by the system.

    Represents a handler for processing server responses.

    RestaurantSettings - Class in Entities
    Represents the configuration and settings of the restaurant, including maximum tables, weekly opening hours, special dates, and reservation duration.

    Private constructor to prevent direct instantiation.

    Controller class responsible for managing restaurant settings, including opening hours, special dates, and table capacity.
